message:
fix(ssh): remove dead WEZTERM_REMOTE_PANE env var from remote commands

Stop inserting WEZTERM_REMOTE_PANE into the remote SSH environment.
This env var was dead code — no remote mux transport exists to consume
it — and produced noisy AcceptEnv warnings on stricter sshd configs.

Replace the FIXME comment with a clear note explaining why the var is
not set: remote mux forwarding (unix domain or escape-sequence-embedded)
must be implemented first. Adds assert_no_remote_pane_env() test helper
and updates 4 existing tests to verify the var is absent. Also includes
minor rustfmt reformatting of a long poll() call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
